overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an upscale neon-lit lounge and bar, then exiting into a futuristic urban plaza with massive holographic billboards and holographic trees. The scene transitions from indoor artificial lighting to the vibrant neon-soaked streets of a cyberpunk city at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale hotel lounge with curved seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the lounge area, passing seated patrons and bamboo planters

notable_agents.action: seated man in white patterned jacket with bright pink suitcase beside him
group of three men seated on curved sofa engaged in conversation

entered.detail: modern curved seating with gold trim and dark upholstery arranged in conversation pits
tall bamboo plants in planters serving as room dividers near the windows
wall-mounted vertical neon light strip with warm white glow
bright pink luggage standing upright next to the seating area

segments.scene_description: Walking through an upscale indoor lounge featuring curved sofas with gold trim, bamboo groves near floor-to-ceiling windows, and scattered patrons relaxing in conversation areas. A bright pink suitcase stands out near the seating.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar with neon lighting and digital advertisements

events.description: approaching glass exit doors leading from indoor bar to outdoor plaza

agents.ego_description: moving toward the bar counter and navigating around patrons before heading to the exit

notable_agents.action: bartender behind the counter preparing drinks and serving customers
patron with blue hair and colorful jacket leaning against the bar counter

entered.detail: long dark polished bar counter with illuminated edges
upholstered bar stools with metallic gold bases arranged along the counter
large illuminated wall displaying product advertisements and brand logos
backlit shelving unit filled with bottles behind the bar

segments.scene_description: Moving through a neon-lit bar area with purple and green ambient lighting, passing the counter with stools and digital advertisement walls. The bartender serves drinks as the camera approaches the glass exit doors leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with giant digital billboards and holographic displays

events.description: exiting the building from indoor bar to outdoor urban plaza with massive billboards
descending stairs from building exit down to plaza level

agents.ego_description: leaving the building and descending stairs into the open plaza with holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrians descending the stairs ahead toward the plaza

entered.detail: wide stairs leading down from the building exit to the plaza level
massive building-sized digital display showing animated advertisements
tree decorated with glowing pink and white holographic light blossoms
open paved pedestrian area surrounded by towering buildings with neon signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building onto a vast urban plaza dominated by building-sized holographic billboards and glowing cherry trees. The camera descends stairs into the open space where neon lights from surrounding buildings illuminate the night.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with transit stop and holographic tree installations

events.description: passing by a bus stop shelter with waiting commuters

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past the bus stop and holographic trees, observing the street activity

notable_agents.action: woman in business attire seated on the bus stop bench waiting for transit

entered.detail: modern enclosed transit shelter with glass panels and integrated lighting
sunken plaza level with market stalls and white umbrellas visible below street level
escalator leading down to the lower plaza level with glowing side panels

segments.scene_description: Walking along the neon-lit city street at night, passing a modern bus stop shelter where commuters wait. Holographic cherry trees line the sidewalk while a lower-level market with glowing stalls is visible down an escalator.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, luxurious interior of an upscale lounge into the sprawling, neon-drenched expanse of a futuristic city plaza. It begins by gliding past gold-trimmed curved sofas and bamboo groves near floor-to-ceiling windows, passing a bright pink suitcase left near the seating. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a bar area saturated with purple and green ambient lighting and digital advertisement walls before approaching the glass exit doors. The scene then opens up as the camera descends stairs from the building into a vast urban plaza dominated by building-sized holographic billboards and glowing cherry trees. Finally, the movement continues along the night-lit city street, passing a modern bus stop shelter and holographic trees before revealing a lower-level market with glowing stalls down an escalator.
